summary: Session 1 (audit & design-lock, audit-only): completed the adoption-bootstrap retirement inventory (11 extension surfaces + 7 live docs with file:line evidence; zero consumer-repo references, so no cross-repo notice needed) and the budget.yaml contract audit (chat bootstrap was the sole writer and writes the PRE-migration shape; the migrator rewrites threshold_scope->scope and injects warn_at_percent:80; the config editor's BUDGET_SCHEMA requires threshold_usd with open schema; NO Python runtime reader exists - disposition.py references budget.yaml in docstrings only; the scaffold materializes router-config.yaml only and never budget.yaml, answering the spec's open question). Welcome-fallback unreachability proven (computeGettingStarted is total, postSnapshot always ships gettingStarted); the one resurrection path is the protocol's gettingStarted optionality, closed by D2 making it required. D1-D4 LOCKED in s1-audit.md sec 4 after a cross-provider design consult (gpt-5-4 $0.3488 + gemini-pro $0.0088, identical prompt, raw outputs saved): D3 CONVERGED on retire-with-redirects (URL-stable compatibility stub + new docs/budget-yaml-schema.md as canonical post-migration contract home); D1 $0 sub-choice SPLIT (gpt-5-4 required-inline-choice vs gemini default-manual) resolved to required inline choice per the workflow doc's explicit 'operator picks' zero-budget contract, gemini dissent recorded and operator-overridable before S2; writer shape CONFIRMED converged (pure-TS, post-migration shape, migrator no-op, editor-schema-valid). D4: Marketplace-only 0.31.0->0.32.0 in S3, no PyPI (no router-side change found). Suites green with code untouched: Python 1222 passed/1 skipped; TS mocha 870 passing + the 2 tracked pre-existing Set-026 failures; Playwright Layer 3 LOCAL 18 passed (4.8m); tier-model drift guard OK. Verification: R1 gpt-5-4 ISSUES_FOUND (1 Major Completeness - mode-band/NTE-default/compat-rule semantics locked without citations) -> citations added to s1-audit.md sec 2.4 + D3 step 2 with the derived rule explicitly marked, s1-issues.json persisted -> R2 gpt-5-4 VERIFIED (narrow re-verify, no regression). Total routed cost $0.4983.

reason.specifics: Session 2 is extension TypeScript implementation (budget step render/wiring/writer + the D2 retirement rip) against the locks this session produced; the ai-assignment.md recommendation for S2 is Claude Code on claude-fable-5 at high effort, and the orchestrator that authored the locks carries the audit context.
